title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. subalatiforme
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. subalatiforme is a type of hawkweed plant, a flowering plant species known for its medicinal and herbal properties. The plant is traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. subalatiforme include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice or cream to aid in wound healing and skin regeneration.
